senses.example: adapt a novel into movie
senses.example_zh: 把小说改编成电影

senses.example: Some people can't adapt to the humid weather.
senses.example_zh: 有些人不适应潮湿的天气。

derivatives: adaptable a. 能适应新环境的
adapter/-or n. 适配器;改编者

senses.def_en: to alter or move slightly to achieve the desired appearance, result etc.
senses.example: Astronauts in flight must adjust themselves to weightlessness.
senses.example_zh: 宇航员在飞行中必须适应失重。

senses.example: Adjusting to the tropical heat was more difficult than they had expected.
senses.example_zh: 适应热带的高温比他们预料的难得多。

senses.def_en: to control or supervise by means of rules and regulations
senses.example: We must try our best to regulate our expenditure.
senses.example_zh: 我们必须尽力控制开支。

senses.example: Sweating helps regulate body temperature.
senses.example_zh: 流汗帮助调节体温。

senses.def_en: a rule or directive made and maintained by an authority
senses.example: It is against traffic regulations to overtake other vehicles without signaling.
senses.example_zh: 没有示意信号就超车是违反交通规则的。

senses.example: A thermostat was used for the regulation of the temperature in the building.
senses.example_zh: 恒温器被用来调节大楼内的温度。

senses.example: Buses equipped with air-conditioners charge you more.
senses.example_zh: 装有空调设备的公共汽车收费要贵些。

senses.def_en: to prepare sb. for a particular activity or problem
senses.example: The course is designed to equip students for a career in nursing.
senses.example_zh: 此课程旨在使学生能够胜任护理工作。

entries.mnemonic: mod(方式)+ify(使)→使…改变方式→修改

senses.def_en: to make small changes to sth. so as to improve it and make it more suitable or effective
senses.example: They agree to modify the contract.
senses.example_zh: 他们同意将合同稍作修改。

senses.example: Adjectives modify nouns.
senses.example_zh: 形容词修饰名词。

entries.mnemonic: con(共同)+form(形式)→(使)形式统一→一致

senses.def_en: to obey or be in accordance with established rules (~ to)
senses.example: Most people willingly conform to the customs of society. // This piece of equipment does not conform to the official safety standards.
senses.example_zh: 大多数人都愿意遵从社会习俗。这件设备不符合官方规定的安全标准。

senses.def_en: to try to satisfy a particular need or demand (~for, to)
senses.example: TV programs must cater to/for many different tastes.
senses.example_zh: 电视节目必须迎合各种人的口味。

senses.example: He runs a restaurant and also caters for weddings and parties.
senses.example_zh: 他经营饭店，还承办婚礼和宴会酒席。

senses.def_en: to cause a problem, danger, difficulty etc.
senses.example: pose a threat to
senses.example_zh: 造成…的威胁

senses.def_en: to raise a question or matter for consideration
senses.example: pose a question
senses.example_zh: 提出一个问题

senses.example: Models are employed by art schools to pose for art students to paint.
senses.example_zh: 艺术学校雇来模特摆姿势给学艺术的学生作画。

senses.def_en: to pretend to be someone else to deceive people
senses.example: She was caught posing as a lawyer.
senses.example_zh: 她冒充律师被当场抓获。

senses.example: put on a pose of
senses.example_zh: 装出…的样子
